criteria.description: Consolidated guard mechanism: single pure policy `core/commit_guard.py::evaluate(target, protection_state, capability) -> GuardVerdict`; `git/commit_helpers.safe_commit` is the only enforcement facade.
criteria.evidence: WP02 (approved): tests/git/test_commit_guard.py 15 passed / 0 xfail; import-boundary ratchet pins evaluate to exactly 2 blessed importers (WP10, 7 passed).
criteria.notes: Verified during per-WP review; all 10 WPs approved.

criteria.description: safe-commit ergonomics: directory args expand to contained dirty files with a per-file report; explicit --to-branch honored; SPEC_KITTY_INFER_DESTINATION_REF env hatch retired.

criteria.description: Planning placement defined by ONE resolved authority: resolve_placement_only(repo_root, mission_slug) -> CommitTarget in mission_runtime/resolution.py; _resolve_planning_branch commit-destination authority retired; spec.md commits on protected branches route to the resolved non-protected destination (no guard relaxation).

criteria.description: Exactly ONE privilege channel: GuardCapability asserted at the surface (never derived from message/file/env/topology). Five legacy channels deleted: message-prefix exception list, allow_protected_branch_in_test_mode, allow_completed_op_on_protected_branch, completed-Op file-content exception, env hatches. Operator escape hatch SPEC_KITTY_ALLOW_PROTECTED_BRANCH_COMMITS retained, documented.
criteria.evidence: WP01+WP03 (approved): protection-preserved suite converged 4 passed/5 xfail(strict) -> 9 passed/0 xfail at channel deletion; WP10 ratchet asserts zero references to deleted symbols in src/. NEGATIVE INVARIANTS (verified on the integrated lane-j tree during WP01/WP03/WP10 reviews): (NI-1) protection PRESERVED — tests/git/test_protection_preserved.py 9 passed / 0 xfail; (NI-2) no parallel guard mechanisms — tests/architectural/test_safe_commit_import_boundary.py 7 passed, strictness proven by rogue-injection proofs (implementer x3 + reviewer's independent proof). Re-runnable on the primary tree immediately after merge.
criteria.notes: Verified during per-WP review; all 10 WPs approved.
